ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_centers" (
  "medical_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medical center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the medical center */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the medical center */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the medical center is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the medical center is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the medical center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the medical center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the medical center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_categories" (
  "visit_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the visit category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visit category */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visit is virtual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payors" (
  "payor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the payor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the payor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the payor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient making the visit */,
  "medical_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical center where the visit occurs */,
  "visit_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit category */,
  "payor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payor */,
  "visit_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "nps_score" INTEGER /* NPS score for the visit */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who conducted the visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan prescribed */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visit is completed */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the next appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_medical_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("medical_center_id") REFERENCES medical_centers ("medical_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_visit_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_category_id") REFERENCES visit_categories ("visit_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_payor_id FOREIGN KEY ("payor_id") REFERENCES payors ("payor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_codes" (
  "visit_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit code */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit the code is assigned to */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the visit */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of the visit code (e.g., confirmation, cancellation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_codes_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_visits" (
  "user_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visit */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit being accessed */,
  "access_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the visit was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_notes" (
  "visit_note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit note */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit the note is about */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the note is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_notes_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_attachments" (
  "visit_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit attachment */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit the attachment is related to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file */,
  "uploaded_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attachment is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_attachments_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_attachments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_reminders" (
  "visit_reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit reminder */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit the reminder is for */,
  "reminder_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Text of the reminder message */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reminder */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reminder is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_reminders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_reminders_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_feedback" (
  "visit_feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit feedback */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit the feedback is for */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patient (1-5) */,
  "created_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feedback */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_feedback_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_feedback_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)
